message:
feat(abi): add 35 single-precision math ABI wrappers with errno handling

Adds ABI layer for all remaining f32 math functions that had core
implementations but no extern "C" wrappers:

- Hyperbolic: sinhf, coshf, tanhf, asinhf, acoshf, atanhf
- Exponential: exp2f, expm1f, log1pf, logbf
- Special: erff, erfcf, tgammaf, lgammaf
- Float utilities: cbrtf, hypotf, copysignf, fdimf, fmaxf, fminf,
  fmaf, remainderf
- Rounding: rintf, nearbyintf, lrintf, llrintf, lroundf, llroundf
- Decomposition: frexpf, ldexpf, modff, ilogbf, scalbnf, scalblnf,
  nextafterf

All wrappers include proper errno handling (EDOM/ERANGE) matching
their f64 counterparts. Updated libc.map and support_matrix.json.

Counts: total_exported=518, implemented=341, raw_syscall=172,
glibc_call_through=5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
